title: AI Engineer
company_focus:
Integrated hardware/software smart-grid platform for
residential EV charging
description:
Ohme is on a mission to accelerate the global transition to
clean, affordable energy. We do that by serving as an
integrated hardware and software smart-grid platform,
focused on the residential EV charging market.

The worlds of energy, transport and artificial intelligence
are colliding and Ohme is at the heart of this new era. By
using technology and data integrations to connect cars,
chargers, people, energy providers and more, Ohme has a
powerful platform that puts the consumer at the core.

Ohme has been selling its chargers to consumers since mid
2019 and has had exponential growth since. We are now
operating in multiple countries and have partnerships with
the likes of VW, Mercedes, Octopus Energy, and other
innovative brands.

We are scaling up the business and are building out the team
for rapid growth. If you’re interested joining a fast-
growing cleantech venture on a data and AI-first journey to
speed up the global transition to clean, affordable energy,
read on!

We are looking for a curious and passionate AI Engineer to
join our growing Data team.

As an AI Engineer at Ohme, you will contribute to the
design, build and operation of our agentic AI framework that
integrates deeply with our platform and data ecosystem.
You’ll work at the intersection of software engineering,
cloud infrastructure, and applied AI, helping to
productionise intelligent agents that interact with data,
services, and users in a reliable and scalable way.

This role is hands-on and engineering-led, with a strong
focus on Python, AWS, Infrastructure as Code, and modern
agentic AI patterns.

Key Responsibilities

- Design, build and maintain agentic AI framework that
  interact with Ohme’s data platform, APIs, and internal
  tools.
- Implement and operate retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
  pipelines using structured and unstructured data sources.
- Build and integrate agent memory, orchestration, and tool-
  use patterns for real-world workflows.
- Develop and deploy AI services using Python or other
  languages using software engineering best practices.
- Define and manage cloud infrastructure using AWS CDK
  (Python) and infrastructure-as-code best practices.
- Collaborate closely with data scientists, data engineers,
  applied AI analysts and product teams to deliver end-to-
  end solutions.
- Comfortable with components such as MCP servers, vector
  stores, and model gateway.
- Ensure AI services are secure, observable, cost-efficient,
  and scalable.
- Contribute to engineering standards, patterns, and best
  practices for AI agents at Ohme.
- Stay up to date with the fast-moving agentic AI ecosystem
  and help translate new capabilities into pragmatic
  solutions.

About You

- Proven professional experience as a software engineer, cloud
  engineer, or AI engineer, with a strong production
  mindset.
- Strong Python skills, including building and operating
  backend services.
- Hands-on experience with AWS, ideally including services
  such as Lambda, Bedrock, API Gateway, AgentCore.
- Experience with Infrastructure as Code, preferably using AWS
  CDK (Python).
- Practical experience with agentic AI components, such as:
- RAG architectures
- MCP servers
- Tool-using agents
- Agent memory and state management
- Multi-step or orchestrated agent workflows
- Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, and semantic
  search.
- Experience integrating LLMs into real applications (OpenAI,
  Anthropic, or similar).
- Comfortable working across the full lifecycle: design →
  build → deploy → operate.
- Strong problem-solving skills and a pragmatic, delivery-
  focused mindset.
- Curiosity and enthusiasm for applied AI and emerging
  industry standards.

Nice to have

- Experience working in data-rich or IoT-heavy environments.
- Knowledge of the EV, energy, or sustainability space.

Benefits

You’ll get to work in a fast-paced and rapidly growing
scale-up with global ambitions that is cutting edge,
passionate about sustainability and seeks to make the world
a better place.

- Competitive salary and bonus
- Private Health Insurance
- Aegon Pension Scheme
- Life Assurance Scheme with death in service benefit of 4x
  salary
- Income Protection Scheme for long term illness
- Ride to Work Scheme
- Payroll Giving Scheme
- Season Ticket Loan to spread cost of travel over 12 month

Diversity, Equity and Inclusion are at the heart of what we
do and we encourage a culture where everyone can be
themselves at work. We actively seek out a diverse range of
talent and our policies ensure that every job application
and employee is treated fairly, with equal opportunity to
succeed and to feel included.

use_cases: Agentic AI framework for smart-grid platform integration
RAG pipelines for structured and unstructured energy/charging data retrieval
Intelligent agents that interact with APIs, data services, and users

ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an AI Engineer role with hands-on responsibility for
building, deploying, and operating agentic AI frameworks,
RAG pipelines, and intelligent agents. The role directly
works with LLM integration, agent orchestration, and
productionizing AI systems, not just supporting
infrastructure for others.
